mapper.select: SELECT w.wishlist_id AS wishlistId, w.user_id AS userId, w.place_id AS placeId, w.created_at AS createdAt, p.name AS placeName, p.region AS placeRegion, p.category AS placeCategory, p.image_url AS imageUrl FROM wishlists w JOIN places p ON w.place_id = p.place_id WHERE w.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY w.created_at DESC
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM wishlists WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND place_id = #{placeId}
mapper.select: SELECT wishlist_id AS wishlistId, user_id AS userId, place_id AS placeId, created_at AS createdAt FROM wishlists WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND place_id = #{placeId}
